benefits.description: Used for weight loss; user lost approximately 85lbs from ~270lbs to 185lbs over ~4 years
Achieved visible abs and approximately 10% body fat

protocol_notes: Recommends starting at 1mg weekly and titrating based on results and side effects after a couple weeks. Emphasizes finding lowest effective dose based on individual response. Mentions importance of calorie deficit, protein intake (1g per lb of goal body weight), cardio, and weightlifting. Recommends cycling: 2-3 months deficit, 2 weeks maintenance, repeat. Personal transformation: lost ~85lbs over ~4 years, currently 185lbs at ~10% BF with visible abs.
